notes.previousChain: phase-19-clone-and-go closed via PR #50 (tracking issue #46 closed); the prior .claude-code/auto-continue-state.json was not refreshed at chain-close and is overwritten here.
notes.labelGap: throughline:pause label still absent in repo; chain operates on the two fallback signals (marker file + /pause comment) per spec-author confirmation 2026-05-27.
notes.slice3Sizing: Slice 3 estimated 900-1100 lines is the calibration data point of this chain. Phase 19's biggest slice ran ~700 lines clean with one fix-round. If three fix-rounds fire on Slice 3, circuit-breaker rationale prescribes retroactive split rather than pre-emptive split.
notes.slice4Placement: SettingsView colocation with ThroughlineStatusBlock is a placement decision C-D20 explicitly left open; Slice 4's handover documents the choice with a 'could move to dedicated block if surfacing density grows' caveat.
